items.name: SmoothConfig
items.comment: Parameters for the Smooth mode: a uniform, non-cascade transition.

fields.name: delay
fields.comment: Fixed delay before the transition starts, in `ms`.

items.name: RippleConfig
items.comment: Parameters for the Ripple mode: a symmetric cascade radiating outward from the active line.

fields.name: range
comment: Offset (in line units) at which the per-line delay saturates.
Lines with `|offset| >= range` all receive the maximum delay.

fields.name: step
fields.comment: Delay increment per offset unit, in `ms`; scales the cascade curve.

items.name: DirectionalConfig
items.comment: Parameters for the Directional mode: played lines move first, upcoming lines follow.

fields.name: range
fields.comment: Offset (in line units) at which the per-line delay saturates.

fields.name: step
fields.comment: Delay increment per offset unit, in `ms`.

items.name: StaggerConfig
items.comment: Parameters for the Stagger mode: a linear, direction-sensitive stagger cascade (legacy).

fields.name: range
fields.comment: Offset (in line units) at which the delay saturates.

fields.name: step
fields.comment: Delay increment per offset unit, in `ms`.

items.name: AnimationConfig
items.comment: Transition animation used when the active line changes.

fields.name: mode
comment: Cascade mode distributing per-line transition delays.
- `0` — smooth (all lines move together, no cascade)
- `1` — ripple (symmetric cascade outward from the active line)
- `2` — directional (played lines move first, upcoming lines follow)
- `3` — stagger (legacy linear stagger; delay saturates at `range`)

fields.name: duration
comment: Transition duration of each individual line, in `ms`.
In cascade modes the total visual length is roughly `duration + maxDelay`.
`0` snaps to the target without easing.

items.name: Root
items.comment: Viewport scrolling that follows the active line.

fields.name: anchor
comment: Vertical anchor of the active line inside the viewport, as a ratio of its height.
- `0.5` — keep the active line at the vertical center
- `0.3` — keep the active line closer to the top

fields.name: animation
fields.comment: Transition animation used when the active line changes.
